diagnostics.message: unresolved toplevel call to `foo`. If a project file defines `foo` via a toplevel `def` or a monkey-patch on Object/Kernel, list that file in `.rigor.yml`'s `pre_eval:` (ADR-17) so the analyzer sees it.
